import React, { useState } from 'react'; const PatientPortal = () => { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('onboarding'); return (

My Health

{activeTab === 'onboarding' && (

Onboarding & Health Questionnaire

Help us understand your baseline health for better predictions.

)} {activeTab === 'tracker' && (

Device Integration & Activity Tracker

Sync your smartwatch or wearable to track your vitals automatically.

Daily Steps

7,240 of 10,000

Heart Rate

72 BPM (Avg)

Apple Watch / Fitbit Sync

Last synced: 10 minutes ago

)} {activeTab === 'timeline' && (

Personalized Risk Trend Timeline

Track how your lifestyle changes affect your AI predicted health risks.

[Risk Trend Line Chart over past 6 months]

Health History

Oct 2025
Annual Checkup: Blood pressure improved from previous visit. Risk profile reduced by 5%.
Jul 2025
AI Assessment: Evaluated for severe headaches. Predicted result: Tension Headache (Low Risk).
)} {activeTab === 'education' && (

Educational Content & Prevention Hub

Tailored content based on your recent symptoms and profile.

5 Stretches for Better Posture

Prevention | 5 min read

Heart-Healthy Diet Overview

Nutrition | 10 min read

)} {activeTab === 'chat' && (

Secure Chat & Telehealth

Connect directly with your care team or the AI health assistant.

Dr. Sarah Smith: Hello! I reviewed your recent AI symptom report. How are you feeling today?
Much better, the new medication seems to be working well.
Excellent. Let's schedule a brief follow-up video call tomorrow to confirm.
)}
); }; export default PatientPortal;
